entities.name: METABOLOMICS
entities.description: The large-scale study of small molecule metabolites and their pathways to understand biological functions.

entities.name: PLANT IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing the genetic makeup of plants to improve their traits and utility.

entities.name: MOLECULAR CHARACTERIZATION
entities.description: The process of identifying and analyzing the molecular components of a cell or organism.

entities.name: CELL
entities.description: The basic structural and functional unit of a biological organism.

entities.name: ORGANISM
entities.description: An individual living system, such as a plant or animal.

entities.name: METABOLITE PROFILING ASSAYS
entities.description: High-throughput assays used to access global data sets of metabolites and metabolic pathways.

entities.name: METABOLITES
entities.description: Small molecule chemical species produced during metabolism.

entities.name: METABOLIC PATHWAYS
entities.description: A linked series of chemical reactions occurring within a cell.

entities.name: QUALITY
entities.description: A characteristic of a plant that determines its value or standard.

entities.name: YIELD RELATED TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics that directly influence the quantity of crop produced.

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE GENETICS
entities.description: The study of continuous traits and the genetic basis of variation.

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOMICS
entities.description: The study of the complete set of RNA transcripts produced by the genome.

entities.name: GENETIC MODIFICATION
entities.description: The process of altering the genetic material of an organism to achieve desired traits.

entities.name: FUNCTIONAL GENES
entities.description: Genes that have a specific, identified biological function.

entities.name: CANDIDATE GENES
entities.description: Genes suspected of being involved in a particular trait or disease.

entities.name: TRAIT SPECIFIC MARKERS
entities.description: Genetic markers linked to specific phenotypic traits.

entities.name: COMMERCIALLY IMPORTANT TRAITS
entities.description: Plant characteristics that increase the economic value of the crop.
